parameters.name: ={{ (() => { const orderRaw = String($("Merge1").item.json.order_number || "").trim(); const action = String($("Merge1").item.json.action_type || ""); let prefix = "Буцаалт"; if (action.indexOf("Гаргасан") !== -1) prefix = "❗Асуудал"; else if (action.indexOf("Хүргэлт") !== -1) prefix = "хүргэлт"; const orderClean = orderRaw.replace(/\D/g, ""); if (!orderClean) prefix = "ALDAA-noOrder"; const d = new Date(Date.now() + 8 * 3600 * 1000); const date = d.toISOString().slice(0,10).replace(/-/g,""); const time = d.toISOString().slice(11,19).replace(/:/g,""); return prefix + "-" + (orderClean || "X") + "-" + date + "-" + time; })() }}.jpg

parameters.text: ={{ "📸 ЗАХИАЛГА #" + ($node["Check Dispatch Button1"].json.callback_query.message.text.match(/#(\d+)/)?.[1] || "") + "\Буцаалт гарын үсэг зура уу." }}
